questions.question: What does PTT stand for on a handheld radio?
questions.reason: PTT means Push To Talk and keys the transmitter while pressed.

questions.question: What is the purpose of a squelch control?

options.text: Mute noise when no valid signal is present

questions.reason: Squelch keeps the speaker quiet until a signal above threshold is received.

questions.question: What can happen if you transmit without a suitable load or antenna connected?
questions.reason: Without a proper load, reflected power can stress and damage transmitter output stages.
